Documentation for creating, deploying, and extending a Flask blog application with database, templates, and tests.


## Files
- **[blog.rst](blog.rst.md)**: Documentation for creating a blog blueprint in Flask, detailing views for listing, creating, updating, and deleting posts.
- **[database.rst](database.rst.md)**: Instructions for setting up and managing a SQLite database in a Flask application, including connection handling, table creation, and command registration.
- **[deploy.rst](deploy.rst.md)**: Instructions for deploying a Flask application to production, including building, installing, and configuring.
- **[factory.rst](factory.rst.md)**: Documentation for setting up a Flask application using an application factory function.
- **[index.rst](index.rst.md)**: A tutorial for creating a basic blog application with Flask, including user registration and post management.
- **[install.rst](install.rst.md)**: Instructions for making a Flask project installable and installing it in a virtual environment.
- **[layout.rst](layout.rst.md)**: Instructions for setting up a Flask project directory, including structure and version control.
- **[next.rst](next.rst.md)**: Guidance for further developing Flask applications with additional features and resources.
- **[static.rst](static.rst.md)**: Documentation for adding and serving static files like CSS in a Flask application.
- **[templates.rst](templates.rst.md)**: Documentation for using Jinja templates in Flask applications, including base layout and authentication templates.
- **[tests.rst](tests.rst.md)**: Documentation for writing and running unit tests in a Flask application using pytest and coverage.
- **[views.rst](views.rst.md)**: Documentation for creating and managing Flask blueprints and views, including authentication and URL generation.
